description: Benchmark tests for openspec-archive skill - Archives completed OpenSpec changes to correct project archive/ directory with CLI bug auto-fix

evals.name: correct-archive-path
evals.prompt: 归档已完成的 OpenSpec: spec_path=openspec/changes/user-auth, project_root=/workspace/my-project, expected_archive=openspec/archive/user-auth

assertions.name: uses_project_archive_path
assertions.description: Should archive to project/openspec/archive/ not standards/

assertions.name: resolves_project_root
assertions.description: Should correctly resolve project root for archive path

assertions.name: confirms_archive_destination
assertions.description: Should confirm the archive destination path

evals.name: cli-bug-fix
evals.prompt: 自动修复 CLI 路径 Bug 并归档: spec_path=openspec/changes/payment-gateway, cli_reported_path=standards/openspec/archive/payment-gateway (错误路径), auto_fix=true

assertions.name: detects_cli_bug
assertions.description: Should detect the CLI path bug (standards/ prefix)
assertions.check: output.includes('bug') || output.includes('fix') || output.includes('修复') || output.includes('incorrect') || output.includes('错误')

assertions.name: corrects_path_automatically
assertions.description: Should auto-correct to project-local openspec/archive/ path

assertions.name: documents_fix_applied
assertions.description: Should document that the bug fix was applied
assertions.check: output.includes('auto-fix') || output.includes('auto_fix') || output.includes('corrected') || output.includes('已修复') || output.includes('fixed')

evals.name: metadata-preservation
evals.prompt: 归档 OpenSpec 并验证元数据完整性: spec_path=openspec/changes/user-auth, metadata={title: '用户认证', version: '1.0', status: 'completed', created: '2026-03-01', author: 'tech-lead'}

assertions.name: preserves_title
assertions.description: Should preserve spec title during archive
assertions.check: output.includes('用户认证') || output.includes('title') || output.includes('标题')

assertions.name: preserves_version
assertions.description: Should preserve spec version during archive

assertions.name: preserves_author
assertions.description: Should preserve author metadata during archive

assertions.name: confirms_integrity
assertions.description: Should confirm data integrity after archive
assertions.check: output.includes('integrity') || output.includes('完整') || output.includes('preserved') || output.includes('保留') || output.includes('success')

evals.name: already-archived-detection
evals.prompt: 检测已归档的 OpenSpec: spec_path=openspec/changes/user-auth, check_archive=openspec/archive/user-auth, detect_duplicates=true

assertions.name: detects_already_archived
assertions.description: Should detect that spec is already archived
assertions.check: output.includes('already') || output.includes('已归档') || output.includes('exists') || output.includes('存在') || output.includes('duplicate')

assertions.name: prevents_duplicate_archive
assertions.description: Should prevent creating a duplicate archive
assertions.check: output.includes('skip') || output.includes('跳过') || output.includes('warn') || output.includes('警告') || output.includes('abort')

assertions.name: reports_archive_location
assertions.description: Should report where the existing archive is located
